problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Dopamine/serotonin. Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
